sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n106306" key="u(datopo/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑδᾰτο-πότης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n106306.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">water-drinker,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0496.tlg001:69" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Phryn.Com.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">69</biblScope> </bibl>; cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὑδροπότης.</foreign> </sense> </entryFree>
